name: Transaction
description: Hyperion sniper rifles fire slowly and begin with poor accuracy, tightening up the longer you stay aimed. Accuracy resets when you stop aiming, so hip-fire and quick-scoping are unreliable. When scoped in, they are very stable with minimal recoil. The Transaction uses a Hyperion barrel, boosting accuracy and recoil control at the cost of a smaller magazine.
notes: In Borderlands: The Pre-Sequel, this weapon often rolls with Hyperion's newer materials and the same style of prefixes seen in Borderlands 2. A related Pre-Sequel variant called the Contract exists, produced by the older Hyperion line. The Transaction is a world drop from any appropriate loot source.
